sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38169" key="e)pana/xremyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανά-χρεμψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">expectoration,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg026:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg026:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
